---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Be concrete.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketch the CLI if relevant:

```sh
claude-sessions <new-command> [options]
```

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is your proposal better?

## Could this be a plugin instead?

`claude-sessions` is built to be extended via plugins. Could this live in a separate `claude-sessions-<name>` package? See the [Extending guide in the README](../../README.md#extending-claude-sessions-write-a-plugin). If it must be a built-in, explain why.
